justification: The diff successfully migrates javax.* to jakarta.* and updates Spring Boot to 3.x, but fails to fully migrate Spring Security from WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter to the modern lambda DSL (SecurityConfig.java still extends the deprecated adapter and uses @Override on configure methods, despite comments suggesting manual migration). It also introduces spurious churn by removing unused imports and refactoring imports in files unrelated to the migration (e.g., JunitTest.java, BookService.java), and uses Java 21 text blocks in a native query which is good but inconsistent with the overall conservative approach.
